metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Coaches, drafts, polishes, and audits Chinese documents based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然), using LLM supervision by the calling Claude Code session itself — zero external API. v6.0 三 mode (coach/polish/audit) + L1 regex gate (230+ rules) + L2 main-session D1-D5 self-judge (mini-rubric inline) + L3 optional clean-context multi-reviewer (prompts/reviewer.md template, JSON schemas/). Strictly enforces GB/T 15834 curly quotes, blocks 公文黑词 (赋能/重塑/闭环/抓手), 元注释 (作为一个 AI 助手), 戏剧化叙事 (三层防御/跑通/翻车). Genres: 公文/讲话稿/调研/述职/汇报/随笔杂文/自媒体/咨询.
